creator: voitau@gmail.com
text:
There are no distrib/FAQ.html and distrib/Readme.txt files in sources
archive. As a result `make install' fails:

===>  Checking if net-p2p/mldonkey already installed
install: /usr/ports/net-p2p/mldonkey/work/mldonkey-2.8.2/distrib/FAQ.html: No such file or directory
*** Error code 71

Fix: 

Touch missing files or remove them from DOCFILES in Makefile.
How-To-Repeat: try to install net-p2p/mldonkey port.
